  • Uses of Guidance in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz

    Methods in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz with parameters of type Guidance
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FuzzResult
    FuzzRunner.run(Class<?> testClass, String testMethod, Guidance guidance)
    Runs a fuzzing campaign for a resolved test method.
    static FuzzResult
    FuzzRunner.run(String testClassName, String testMethod, Guidance guidance)
    Runs a fuzzing campaign for a test method, loading the class with the system class loader.
    static FuzzResult
    FuzzRunner.run(String testClassName, String testMethod, ClassLoader loader, Guidance guidance)
    Runs a fuzzing campaign for a test method, loading the class with the given class loader.

    Constructor
    Description
     
    FuzzRunner(ArgumentsGenerator argumentsGenerator, TrialExecutor trialExecutor, Guidance guidance, ResultClassifier classifier, List<Class<?>> expectedExceptions, Observability observability, boolean skipExceptionSwallow)

    Classes in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.afl that implement Guidance
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AFLGuidance
    A front-end that uses AFL for guided fuzzing.
    class 
    PerfFuzzGuidance
    A front-end that uses AFL for increasing performance counters in addition to code coverage.

  • Uses of Guidance in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.ei

    Classes in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.ei that implement Guidance
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ExecutionIndexingGuidance
    A guidance that represents inputs as maps from execution indexes to parameters.
    class 
    ZestGuidance
    A guidance that performs coverage-guided fuzzing using two coverage maps, one for all inputs and one for valid inputs only.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Guidance
    GuidedFuzzing.GuidanceSupplier.get(String methodName)
    Creates a new guidance instance
    static Guidance
    GuidedFuzzing.getCurrentGuidance()
    Returns the currently registered Guidance instance.
    Methods in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.junit with parameters of type Guidance
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Result
    GuidedFuzzing.run(Class<?> testClass, String testMethod, Guidance guidance, PrintStream out)
    Runs the guided fuzzing loop for a resolved class.
    static Result
    GuidedFuzzing.run(String testClassName, String testMethod, Guidance guidance, PrintStream out)
    Runs the guided fuzzing loop, using the system class loader to load test-application classes.
    static Result
    GuidedFuzzing.run(String testClassName, String testMethod, ClassLoader loader, Guidance guidance, PrintStream out)
    Runs the guided fuzzing loop, using a provided classloader to load test-application classes.
    static void
    GuidedFuzzing.setGuidance(Guidance g)
    Sets the current global fuzzing guidance.

    NoGuidance

  • Uses of Guidance in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.repro

    Classes in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.fuzz.repro that implement Guidance
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ReproGuidance
    A front-end that provides a specified set of inputs for test case reproduction, This class enables reproduction of a test case with an input file generated by a guided fuzzing front-end such as AFL.
    class 
    ReproServerGuidance

    Methods in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.junit5 that return Guidance
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Guidance
    JUnit5FuzzConfig.createGuidance()
    Builds the guidance for a fuzzing campaign.
    static Guidance
    JUnit5FuzzConfig.installedGuidance()
    Returns the externally installed guidance, or null if none is set.
    Methods in edu.berkeley.cs.jqf.junit5 with parameters of type Guidance
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FuzzResult
    JUnit5FuzzRunner.fuzz(Class<?> testClass, Method method, Guidance guidance, ArgumentsGenerator arguments)
    Runs a full fuzzing campaign for a fuzz-test method under the given guidance.
    static void
    JUnit5FuzzConfig.installGuidance(Guidance guidance)
    Installs a guidance to drive every subsequent @FuzzTest run.
